prompt: Create a realistic full-body fashion editorial portrait of a young adult woman standing in a minimalist industrial studio with a dark gray concrete wall and polished concrete floor. She has long wavy dark brown hair, with her face intentionally obscured by a smooth rectangular blur for anonymity. She wears an elegant black semi-sheer lace long-sleeve high-neck jumpsuit with wide-leg pants and visible opaque black underlayer, paired with black pointed stiletto heels. Pose her slightly angled toward the camera, one hand resting softly at the waist and the other arm relaxed at her side, with a poised high-fashion attitude. Use moody studio lighting from the upper left, soft shadows, subtle highlights on the lace texture, muted charcoal tones, shallow background detail, and a premium magazine look. Vertical composition, full body visible, centered slightly left, realistic photography, 85mm lens feel, high resolution, no text, no logos.
